questions.question: Describe the difference between a hub and a switch. How do their functions impact network performance?
questions.hint: Explain the role of hubs and switches in a network, including their functionality, advantages, and disadvantages

questions.question: What is the purpose of the OSI model, and how does it relate to the TCP/IP model? Provide an example of a situation where both models are used.
questions.hint: Explain the OSI and TCP/IP models, their layers, and their functions in data communication, including real-world scenarios

questions.question: Compare and contrast the advantages and disadvantages of a bus topology versus a star topology. Which type of topology is more suitable for a large enterprise network?
questions.hint: Analyze the characteristics of bus and star topologies, including their advantages, disadvantages, and suitability for different network configurations
